  "rationale": {"R1.1": "The revision clarifies the contribution and removes hedging, but could benefit from a more precise framing of the novelty compared to prior work.", "R1.4": "The revision identifies relevant prior work and articulates the key differences, demonstrating an understanding of the field.", "RX.1": "The revision acknowledges potential limitations in the deployment performance, but does not explicitly quantify uncertainty for specific claims.", "RX.3": "The revision stays within the scope of the original prompt and addresses all requested dimensions.", "RX.4": "The revision does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "The revision lacks traceability information for the changes made."},

rationale.R1.1: The revision clarifies the contribution and removes hedging, but could benefit from a more precise framing of the novelty compared to prior work.
rationale.R1.4: The revision identifies relevant prior work and articulates the key differences, demonstrating an understanding of the field.
rationale.RX.1: The revision acknowledges potential limitations in the deployment performance, but does not explicitly quantify uncertainty for specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: The revision stays within the scope of the original prompt and addresses all requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The revision does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revision lacks traceability information for the changes made.
